summary: Iteration 38 - QR Page and Clear Holdings Button Testing: All backend tests passed (7/7). QR page working correctly with tabs, tunnel status, and QR code. Fixed missing @router.post decorator for POST /api/holdings endpoint. Clear All Holdings button visible on Invest screen below holdings cards.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: POST /api/holdings was missing @router.post decorator - added at line 46 in holdings.py
QR page renders correctly with Visor Finance branding, Expo Go/Web Preview tabs, QR canvas, tunnel status indicator
Clear All Holdings button visible below holdings cards when user has holdings
All expected UI elements present on Invest screen: Indian Markets, Portfolio Overview, My Holdings, Stock cards, MF cards, Asset Allocation pie chart

verified_elements: Expo Go (Mobile) tab - active by default
QR code canvas with working QR
Open in Expo Go button with exp:// link
Indian Markets section with Nifty 50, SENSEX, Nifty Bank, Gold, Silver
My Holdings section with Import Statement dropdown
Mutual Funds card showing MF holdings
Clear All Holdings button (red) visible below holdings cards

seed_data_creation: Created 4 sample holdings (2 stocks, 2 MFs) for demo user after testing cleared previous holdings
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR page and Clear Holdings button fully verified. Fixed POST /api/holdings bug (missing decorator). Demo user has 4 holdings (2 stocks: Reliance, TCS; 2 MFs: HDFC Flexi Cap, Parag Parikh Flexi Cap). Total invested: ~126K INR.
